narrative_beat: Wide low-angle tres tanques com canhoes apontados para cima

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: three stylized war tanks in converging perspective from a low angle, their cannon barrels pointed upward toward a stormy sky, rendered in dark steel with warm amber reflections on their armor plating
subject.focal_point: the central tank's cannon barrel pointing directly upward
subject.secondary: Stormy sky in monochrome above. Ground debris in foreground.
props: dark steel armor with amber reflections

environment.time_of_day: overcast storm light with amber fire reflections

composition.foreground: tanks in warm amber-reflected dark steel tones

lighting.key_light: overcast diffused light from stormy sky
lighting.fill_light: warm amber fire reflections on armor

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: war machine convergence, weapons pointed at the sky

symbolism.primary: tanks on the magazine cover — war is on the agenda
symbolism.secondary: cannons pointed up as if challenging heaven

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
